name: @sigx/benchmarks
description: Comparative SSR benchmarks (sigx vs Vue vs React vs Preact) plus sigx request-path micro benches

scripts.bench: node --conditions production src/verify-equivalence.ts && node --conditions production src/run-all.ts
scripts.bench:quick: node --conditions production src/quick.ts && node --conditions production src/check-regression.ts
scripts.bench:quick:enforce: node --conditions production src/quick.ts && node --conditions production src/check-regression.ts --enforce
scripts.bench:baseline: node --conditions production src/run-all.ts --baseline && node --conditions production src/run-stream.ts --baseline && node --conditions production src/run-micro.ts --baseline && node --conditions production src/quick.ts --baseline
